Package org.eventb.core.ast

Interface IFormulaInspector<F>

Type Parameters:
F - type of the findings reported by this inspector
All Known Implementing Classes:
DefaultApplicationInspector, DefaultInspector, FilteringInspector, FormulaTranslatabilityChecker, LanguageFilter, LocalEqRewriteProvider.LocalEqRewriteAppliInspector
public interface IFormulaInspector<F>
Common protocol for inspecting formulas. An inspector will be called on each sub-formula of a given formula. For each sub-formula, the inspector can report findings through an accumulator. The accumulator can also be used for fine-tuning the behavior of the inspector by specifying some sub-formulas to skip during traversal.

This interface contains one method for each of the sub-classes of Formula, except assignments which are not covered.

Clients may implement this interface.

Since:
2.0
See Also:
  • Formula.inspect(IFormulaInspector)
  • DefaultInspector
  • IAccumulator
